form.formComment: Last start finished fourth in a Grade 5 on March 4 over 320m at Richmond behind Nirmada, beaten 5 lengths (19.04). The form from the last run stacks up well. Worth including.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished last over 365m at this track beaten 9 lengths (21.51) behind Spring Breezing in a Grade 5 on April 9. Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when eighth (21.90) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 3 for the first time. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (29.96) over 520m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Showed strong early pace and proved too slick around this track over 365m in 21.01, claiming a Grade 5 by 0.8 lengths. Has won two races from this draw. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the home straight and ran wide, losing momentum.
Checked off heels entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a nose win at this track over 365m in 20.71. Has returned in winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 365m (20.80) beating Forrest Gump in Maiden on April 13. Returned in winning form and can go on with it.
